svg.title: Build rhythm: GitHub weekly commits and code changes
svg.desc: Build rhythm: weekly commits, line additions, and line deletions from owned repositories' default branches, using GitHub contributor statistics with an anchored, author-filtered GraphQL history fallback, 2021-07-18 through 2026-07-12, shown on a symmetric logarithmic line scale and a separate zero-preserving log1p commit scale. Total commits 2,937; total additions 29,104,552; total deletions 28,513,915; 160 active weeks. Largest observed week Jul 05, 2026: 24,221,074 additions and 21,992,178 deletions.
svg.text: Weekly commits + lines touched · readable log scales · last five years
Lines touched and commits, not productivity
Updated 2026-07-12 · contributor stats + anchored GraphQL fallback
Open the site view for exact weeks and scale comparison →
